Overview ConnectM is a constellation of companies connecting and powering next generation equipment, mobility and distributed energythus enabling a faster, smarter transition to a modern energy economy. The Company delivers an advanced, proprietary Energy Intelligence Network ( EIN ) platform designed to empower residential and commercial service providers and original equipment manufacturers, to optimize energy efficiency, enhance operational performance, and support sustainable innovation.
